svg.text: ARTIST 2 = THE EIGHT GLYPHS
figure / comma / squared H / mountain / fishbone / X / jellyfish / V. Judged at 18 and 32, never at 4x.
SIZE LADDER = 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 px tall, frame 1 then frame 2, on panel and on terrain
ALL EIGHT SILHOUETTES = the collision test. Frame 1 at 32 px, then frame 2 at 32 px, then frame 1 at 18 px.
humanoid
gollumer
mechtron
packer
leggite
bonzoid
spheroid
flapper
4x INSPECTION = 80 x 128, for edge checking only. No creature was approved from this row.
MATRIX = 8 species x 4 player colors x 3 backgrounds, all at 32 px tall, the size the game draws
deep space #1a1a2e
terrain #7c9a4e (the hard case: green on green)
panel #22223a
DOCK BADGE = the head crop at 18 px, the only thing the auction dock draws. Four player colors.
HEAD CROPS at 96 px, so a human can see what the 18 px badge above is made of
Notch budget actually spent: mechtron antenna gap 66 units (26 survive the halo), leggite gap between leg pairs 54 to 60 (14 to 20 survive),
flapper swallowtail fork 60 (20 survive), humanoid leg split 56 (16 survive), mechtron stilt split 52 (12 survive), bonzoid stance 52 (12 survive).
Wedges held: mechtron torso 120 fill (floor 96). Leggite core 52 (ceiling 60). Bonzoid waist 52 (ceiling 70). Flapper torso 58 (ceiling 60).
Every limb is at or above the 26 unit fill floor. Every leggite leg and every spheroid tentacle is the identical rect; only the angle varies.
